calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Rodney M. Sweet, Esq. appeared for plaintiff John F. Britton, Trustee of the Patricia Ann Britton Irrevocable Trust.
Jonathan Britton, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by ATOL Ltd, dba a Taste of Leather, or Daralt.
Defaults were entered against defendants on April 5, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 5, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff John F. Britton, Trustee of the Patricia Ann Briton Irrevocable Trust, and against the Defaulted Defendants ATOL Ltd., dba A Taste of Leather, and Daralt as follows:

Damages/Principal - $24,631.62.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,646.24.
Attorney's Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $0.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $29,102.86.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2010 Continued To Jul-20-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-04-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2009 Off Calendar
